utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. Now check the final solution: it includes property (with details and price), financing (options with rates, terms, payments, fees), legal_services (package and cost), moving_services (service and cost), setup_services (survey, security, utilities with costs/descriptions), and total_budget (breakdown). Each item is present and reasonably fully specified according to the format: property includes details and price; financing includes a solution with terms; legal_services includes services and costs; moving_services includes arrangements and costs; setup_services includes utility/setup services; total_budget provides a complete cost breakdown. Therefore, all 6/6 items are covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes the following items that have corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings: Historic Townhouse (purchase property), Traditional Mortgage (purchase financing), Self-Employed Mortgage (purchase financing), Premium Legal Package (essential legal services), Standard Moving (moving services), Full Structural Survey (property surveys/inspections), Basic Utilities (called Basic Utilities Setup in solution but matches Basic Utilities in utility_setup), and Security Monitoring (lifestyle_convenience_services -> local_area_integration). I matched each item name to the exact ground-truth item and extracted its rating.
